hyperedges.label: Sign-Up Validation Flow: SignUpValidations + Validations + FetchAPI
Session Lifecycle: main.js + router.js + FetchAPI updateUser
Combat Data Model: Heroes + Monsters + Levels
Auth Pages Sharing LocalStorage User State

nodes.label: Turn-Based Gameplay Mechanics
nodes.rationale: Players take turns attacking each other with strategy; skill points accumulate per turn up to 4 max; first turn bonus for the player who acts second; three actions available: Attack, Defense, Charge; all skill points must be used to end a turn; player with 0 HP loses

nodes.label: Skills Image Reference (craftpix.net - Swordsman Skills Icons)
nodes.norm_label: skills image reference (craftpix.net - swordsman skills icons)

nodes.label: Visual Elements: Towers, Flags, Trees, Sky, Clouds
nodes.norm_label: visual elements: towers, flags, trees, sky, clouds

properties.setting: sky-high stone platform between two tower structures
visual_elements: two circular stone towers with red tiled rooftops at left and right edges
heavy metal chains connecting the towers in the background
stone brick flooring with large flat paving tiles
a low stone parapet wall along the bottom edge
sparse dry grass tufts growing from cracks in the stone
clouds surrounding the platform at mid-level suggesting great height
sky with pale overcast lighting visible behind clouds
color_palette: warm beige and tan for stonework
pale off-white and light blue for cloudy sky
properties.purpose: game level background for a high-altitude fortress or castle rooftop stage, likely a late-game or boss encounter level given the dramatic elevated setting and chains between towers

properties.description: A 2D game stage background depicting a wooden bridge or dock platform in the foreground, with a glowing teal/cyan river or pool behind it, flanked by large moss-covered tree trunks in a misty forest environment. Small patches of grass and foliage are visible at the edges.
visual_elements: wooden plank platform/bridge (foreground, occupies lower half)
large moss-covered tree trunks (left and right sides)
stone or tile border separating platform from water
color_palette: dark olive green (tree trunks and moss)
properties.purpose: Game level background for Stage 1; provides a nature/forest environment with a bridge-over-water motif suitable for a side-scrolling or arena-style game

properties.description: Large wooden plank surface with visible plank seams and a stone/tile border at the top edge, serving as the main play area ground layer
A luminous teal-cyan water body visible behind the wooden platform, giving a magical or mystical quality to the scene
Background layer featuring tall dark tree trunks with moss, surrounded by atmospheric mist and fog, creating depth and a fantasy forest setting

nodes.label: Color Palette: Warm Browns, Ocean Blues, Golden Yellow, Soft Pinks
nodes.norm_label: color palette: warm browns, ocean blues, golden yellow, soft pinks

properties.description: A 2D side-scrolling game stage background depicting a medieval castle wall viewed from the outside. The foreground features a large wooden bridge or drawbridge platform with plank textures. Behind it stands a stone castle battlement wall with multiple cylindrical towers topped with green conical roofs. Mountains and a partly cloudy sky are visible in the background. Green shrubs and grass appear at the bottom corners.
visual_elements: cylindrical stone towers with green conical roofs
properties.purpose: Game level background for Stage 3, suggesting a medieval castle setting typical of action or platformer games
properties.art_style: 2D cartoon/illustrated, flat shading with stylized textures

properties.description: A game skill icon depicting a reddish-brown humanoid figure with one fist raised triumphantly into the air, glowing with a green energy aura. The background is a vivid green, suggesting power or nature energy. The figure's muscular pose conveys charging up or empowering a skill. The art style is hand-drawn/illustrated with bold outlines typical of RPG or action game skill icons.
properties.visual_style: illustrated game icon, bold outlines, warm red-brown character, green energy glow, square with rounded corners
properties.symbolism: power charge, energy buildup, strength empowerment

properties.description: A game skill icon depicting a dark stone or metal dagger/blade oriented diagonally from lower-left to upper-right. The blade has a jagged, rough texture with dark teal/gray coloring and visible highlights suggesting a worn stone weapon. Three drops of red blood drip from the blade tip, emphasizing a physical attack action. The background is a deep purple with dark cave-like stalactite shapes framing the icon, giving a dungeon or dark fantasy aesthetic. The icon communicates a melee or physical attack skill.
properties.symbolism: blood-dripping blade indicating physical damage or melee attack

properties.description: A game skill icon depicting a green heraldic shield with a diagonal sword overlaid across it. The shield features a dark green divided field with lighter green sections and sketch-like black linework. A brown-handled sword with a dark blade crosses the shield diagonally from upper-left to lower-right. The background is a teal/aqua textured color with radiating highlight streaks suggesting energy or emphasis. The overall aesthetic is hand-drawn or illustrated in a fantasy RPG style. Symbolizes defensive combat capability combining shield protection with sword readiness.
properties.symbolism: Shield represents protection and defense; sword overlay suggests active defensive combat; radiating background suggests skill activation or power
properties.shape: rounded square icon with shield and sword motif

properties.description: A female mage hero character rendered in detailed pixel art style. She has a light blue head covering and dark skin tone. She wears a dark navy/blue outfit with a feathered or fur-trimmed skirt in deep blue, a fitted dark bodice with a gold belt, and sandals. She carries a golden staff with an orb at the bottom in one hand, and holds a blue lightning bolt in the other hand, indicating magical ability. Gold jewelry including a necklace and bracelets are visible. Her pose is dynamic and confident, facing slightly to the right.
properties.art_style: pixel art with high detail and illustrated quality
properties.visual_style: semi-detailed pixel art, fantasy RPG character sprite

properties.description: A pixel art RPG wizard/mage character standing upright. The character is a stocky male figure with reddish-brown hair and a beard, wearing a dramatic red cape with white fur trim draped over both shoulders. Beneath the cape he wears a brown tunic secured with a belt, white puffy sleeves, and tall brown boots. He holds a long staff in his right hand topped with a glowing red/orange orb. The art style is detailed pixel art with a fantasy RPG aesthetic, reminiscent of classic JRPG or strategy RPG sprite work. Color palette is dominated by deep reds, warm browns, and white accents. Class archetype: Mage/Wizard/Sorcerer.

A pixel-art style game character sprite depicting a male lancer/spear-wielding hero. The character has short reddish-brown hair and a mustache, wearing layered dark green and black armor with silver trim and shoulder pauldrons. He wears a green cape/cloak draped over one shoulder. He holds a tall wooden spear with a pointed metal tip in his right hand, standing in a relaxed idle pose. The art style is semi-detailed 2D pixel/sprite art with clean outlines, typical of classic RPG or strategy game aesthetics. The character exudes a seasoned warrior or knight archetype.
properties.art_style: 2D pixel sprite art / semi-detailed RPG style

properties.description: A pixel art style male elf warrior character standing in a neutral pose. He has pointed ears, blonde/golden hair with a headband, and a slender build. He wears dark navy/black armor with gold trim accents, including a chest piece with a circular golden emblem, dark gloves, and armored boots. He holds a long straight sword pointed downward in front of him with both hands. A round shield is visible on his back or side. The art style is detailed 2D pixel/sprite art with clean shading and a fantasy RPG aesthetic.
properties.pose: standing neutral with sword held downward

nodes.label: Merchant Hero Character
nodes.description: Pixel art style merchant/trader character. A humanoid figure with pointed elf-like ears and short pinkish-red hair. Wears a long cream/beige coat with dark cross-lace detailing on the chest, black trousers, and barefoot or light sandals. Carries a large purple potion bottle in one hand, a rolled scroll or map tucked under the arm, and a small brown satchel/bag at the side. Additional small items (pouches, goods) hang from the belt area. Warm medium skin tone. Art style is detailed pixel/sprite art with shading, consistent with a fantasy RPG aesthetic. Class archetype: merchant, alchemist-adjacent trader. Color palette: cream, beige, black, purple (potion), brown, muted reds.

properties.description: A humanoid dragon monster sprite in pixel/semi-pixel art style. The creature stands upright on two legs, holding a wooden staff. It has red scaly skin with dark red horns on its head, large dark green bat-like wings folded behind its body, clawed feet and hands, and wears a simple green tunic/cloak. One leg appears bandaged. The monster has a masked or beaked face with red coloring. The overall appearance suggests a dragonborn or lizardfolk-type enemy character. Art style is detailed 2D RPG sprite work with muted earthy tones contrasted by the vivid red skin.

nodes.label: Jhin Monster
nodes.description: A female demon/monster sprite in RPG pixel-art style. The character has blue skin, dark blue curved horns, and large dark blue bat-like wings spread behind her. She wears an orange and white dress with a corset-style bodice in orange/gold, and a flowing white skirt. She holds a long silver sword/blade horizontally in front of her. Her feet/legs are scaled or armored in orange-gold, resembling dragon or reptilian feet. The art style is 2D sprite-based, reminiscent of classic JRPG or tactical RPG games. Overall color palette: blue, white, orange/gold, dark navy wings.
nodes.visual_style: 2D RPG sprite, JRPG aesthetic, classic game art

properties.description: Pixel art style game sprite of Medusa, depicted as a female humanoid monster with red hair and small red horns, wearing an orange tunic/dress with a flowing green cape. She has gray-toned skin and is holding a flame in one raised hand. She wears gold greaves and dark blue boots. The character stands in a frontal pose typical of RPG monster sprites.

A reptilian humanoid monster character sprite rendered in a 2D RPG art style. The creature has dark blue-green scaly skin, curved horns on its head, and a bipedal humanoid body. It wears a purple tunic/robe with a brown belt, dark teal armor on the arms and shoulders, and beige/bone-colored leg armor with spiky protrusions. The LizardMan wields two long daggers or short swords, one in each hand, held outward in a combat-ready stance. The overall art style is classic JRPG sprite with clean outlines and flat shading, reminiscent of Dragon Quest or similar fantasy RPG aesthetics.
properties.art_style: 2D RPG sprite, JRPG style, flat shading with outlines
properties.armor: arm guards, shoulder plates, leg armor

nodes.label: Demon Monster
nodes.description: A humanoid demon character rendered in pixel/RPG art style. The creature has a pale grayish-blue skin tone with a lean, tall build. It wears a red draped vest/tunic and has brown furry lower body and legs resembling a satyr or beast-man. It has wild brown hair with small horns, and holds a small red imp or skull-like creature in one raised hand while the other hand appears clawed or holding a weapon. The color palette is dominated by red, brown, and gray. The art style is detailed 2D sprite work typical of classic RPG or indie fantasy games. Menace level is moderate to high — the figure looks sinister and magical, suggesting a spellcaster or summoner demon archetype.

properties.art_style: classic RPG / indie fantasy pixel art

properties.description: A right-facing navigation button with a chevron/arrow icon pointing right. The button has a dark navy/blue gradient square background with an octagonal shape achieved via beveled/chamfered corners. The border has a teal/cyan highlight color giving it a glowing neon accent. The chevron arrow in the center is light blue-white (near-white with a subtle blue tint), suggesting a forward or next navigation action. The overall visual style is reminiscent of a sci-fi or game UI aesthetic with dark backgrounds and neon accents. The button suggests a 'next' or 'forward' interaction for carousel, slideshow, or paginated navigation.

A curved left-pointing arrow icon used as a back/return navigation button. The arrow has a sweeping curved body that arcs from the right side downward and curves back to the left, with a large arrowhead pointing left. The design is a solid dark charcoal/dark gray fill on a white background with no border or container shape. The style is flat and iconographic, representing a return or undo-style navigation action. Commonly used in UI to navigate back to a previous screen or step.
properties.shape: curved arrow with arrowhead pointing left
properties.style: flat icon, solid fill, no outline
properties.interaction: navigation back or return to previous view

nodes.label: Left Navigation Button
nodes.description: A left-facing chevron/arrow navigation button with a dark navy-blue octagonal rounded square background featuring a teal/cyan border outline. The chevron arrow is rendered in a light mint/pale cyan color with a subtle 3D bevel effect. The button uses a gradient from dark navy at center to slightly lighter blue at edges. The overall design suggests a 'previous' or 'back' navigation control, suitable for carousels, sliders, or paginated UI navigation. The octagonal clipped corners and glowing teal border give it a futuristic or game-like UI aesthetic.

properties.description: Pixel-art style logo displaying the word 'VUEVIEW' with a large stylized orange and white gradient 'V' followed by 'UEVIEW' in matching pixel font. The text uses an orange-to-white gradient with a retro pixel/bitmap aesthetic, suggesting a game or entertainment platform branding.
properties.style: pixel art, retro bitmap font, orange-white gradient

properties.description: A stack of gold coins rendered in a cartoon/illustrated style. The coins are bright yellow-gold with a crown emblem stamped on their faces. The stack is arranged in a pyramid-like pile of approximately 6-7 coins, with ridged/serrated edges visible. The art style is polished and game-ready, consistent with in-game currency or reward UI elements. Likely represents the primary currency used in the game for purchases, rewards, or scoring.
properties.visual_style: cartoon/illustrated, vibrant golden-yellow color palette, bold outlines, slight shading for depth
properties.ui_role: currency icon, reward indicator, or shop price display

nodes.label: Full Card Frame
nodes.description: A game card template with a dark navy/charcoal border featuring gold trim and decorative fleur-de-lis ornaments at the top corners and top center. The card has a rounded arch shape at the top. The interior background is a warm cream/parchment color. In the lower-middle section, there is a blue ribbon/banner element with fabric folds on the sides, overlaying a scroll-like parchment text area with aged/torn edges. The overall style is fantasy RPG, suitable for character or item cards in a game inventory or shop UI.

nodes.label: Half Card Frame
nodes.description: A half-card UI frame asset in a fantasy/medieval pixel-art style. Features a dark navy/slate blue background border with ornate gold trim and beaded edge detail running along all four sides. The interior content area is defined by a prominent rounded arch (archway) shape with gold outlining, revealing a cream/parchment-colored background. The upper-left and upper-right corners each display decorative gold fleur-de-lis or leaf-and-scroll ornaments with small blue accent gems. The overall aesthetic is regal and gothic, consistent with a trading card game or RPG inventory UI. The card appears to be a shorter/taller variant (portrait orientation, cut at the top) used for displaying character or item artwork within an arched window frame.

properties.description: Eye icon representing password visibility toggle. Solid black eye shape with a white circular iris/pupil in the center. Simple, flat design style on a transparent background. Used as a UI icon to show/reveal hidden password text.

nodes.label: Invisible/Hide Icon
nodes.description: A black eye icon with a diagonal slash through it, representing a password visibility toggle in the hidden/invisible state. The icon is monochromatic (solid black) on a transparent background, with a minimalist flat design style. Commonly used as a UI element to hide/mask password input fields.

links.source_location: level field maps to levels id

attributes.description: Features multiple pointed towers with orange roofs, red pennant flags, stone walls with a central arched gate, green trees and bushes at the base, a light blue sky with white clouds, and distant birds
The image conveys a cheerful, adventurous fairytale atmosphere suitable for a fantasy game scene
Intended as a game scene background, likely for a location such as a castle level, town, or story chapter set in a fantasy world
The image uses a flat cartoon/comic illustration style with bold outlines and cel-shading, reminiscent of animated fairytale art

properties.description: Stage 1 background contains the misty forest as its background layer
Stage 1 background contains the glowing water element in the mid-ground
Stage 1 background contains the wooden platform as its foreground layer
The wooden platform sits in front of the glowing water, suggesting it is a bridge or dock over water
